libraries.name: rbush
libraries.usage: R-tree spatial index for fast WebGIS hit-testing and viewport queries.

libraries.name: @turf/turf
libraries.usage: Lazy-loaded geodesic distance and area measurement helpers.

update_notes: Replace the runtime file and matching LICENSE file in this folder.
Update the version query string in webgis_demo/index.html or webgis_demo/js/measure.js.
Run tools/check_plugin.py and tools/package_plugin.py before sharing the plugin.
